prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津市综合类最低位次分别为10670→10834→12429→11304→14133，整体呈后移趋势，近4年累计后移约3463名；2025年基准位次约14133名，较2024年 大幅后移2829名，波动明显；该校在天津市2021–2025年招生计划均为120人，2026年计划增至150人，扩招30人（+25%），为近年最大幅度扩招，理 论上使竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 太原理工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第113名持续上升至2026年第97名，排名稳步提升，反映学校 综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所增加；该校在声誉数据中2022年曾因管理问题出现偏负面评价，但近年无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第63位，评价为「一 般」，短视频平台曝光度中等，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；无投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中化学工程与技术获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，化工相 关专业具有一定学科优势；其余学科未进入A类，整体学科竞争力在211高校中处于中游水平。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度 持续偏高，与该校理工科定位契合；天津市2026年高考考生总数约82000人，较2025年71938人增加约10062人（+14%），竞争加剧；太原理工大学位于山西省太原市，非天津本地高校，天津考生报考属跨省选择；该校在天津招生计划占比较小，2025年天津招生120人， 占该校全国总招生计划比例有限，地域偏好因素影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年扩招25%的缓解效应、天津市考生总数增加14%带来的竞争加 剧，以及学校软科排名持续上升的正面信号，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准14133名基础上继续后移，但扩招效应与考生增加效应部分对冲；预测最低位次约16053名，区 间15553–16553名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约16053名，区间15553–16553名。位次在区间下限（15553名）以内可重点冲刺一档电气、计算机、电子信息等热门工科专业；位次在区间中段（约16000名）建议以二 档自动化、机械、通信等专业为主，兼顾一档边缘专业；位次在区间上限（16553名）附近建议以三档化工、材料等专业保底，同时关注扩招后可能出现的录取位次后移机会。化 学工程与技术为该校唯一A-学科，虽属生化环材大类，但学科实力突出，对化工方向有兴趣的考生可重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Tianjin comprehensive category were 10670 → 10834 → 12429 → 11304 → 14133, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3463 places in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 14133, a significant backward shift of 2829 places compared to 2024, with obvious fluctuations; the university's enrollment plan in Tianjin from 2021 to 2025 was 120 students each year, and in 2026 it increased to 150 students, an expansion of 30 students (+25%), the largest expansion in recent years, theoretically easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking has steadily risen from 113th in 2021 to 97th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; in reputation data, there was a somewhat negative evaluation in 2022 due to management issues, but no major negative public opinion in recent years; total Douyin popularity ranking is 63rd, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms and no obvious signs of rising application interest; no record of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, giving related majors a certain disciplinary advantage; other disciplines did not enter the A category, and overall disciplinary competitiveness is at a mid-level among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, aligning with the university's science and engineering orientation; the total number of Tianjin college entrance exam candidates in 2026 is about 82,000, an increase of about 10,062 (+14%) compared to 71,938 in 2025, intensifying competition; Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Taiyuan, Shanxi Province, not a local Tianjin university, so Tianjin candidates applying are making cross-province choices; the university's enrollment plan in Tianjin is relatively small, with 120 students in 2025, accounting for a limited proportion of the national total, and regional preference factors are neutral.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the mitigating effect of a 25% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition from a 14% increase in Tianjin candidates, and the positive signal of the university's rising Soft Science ranking, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 14133, but the expansion effect and candidate increase effect will partially offset each other; the predicted minimum ranking is about 16053, with a range of 15553–16553.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 16053, with a range of 15553–16553. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (15553) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular engineering majors like Electrical, Computer, and Electronic Information; those with rankings in the middle of the range (about 16000) are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Automation, Mechanical, and Communication, while also considering borderline Tier 1 majors; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (16553) are advised to use Tier 3 majors like Chemical Engineering and Materials as safety options, while also paying attention to possible ranking backward shifts after expansion. Chemical Engineering and Technology is the university's only A- discipline, and although it falls under the broader category of biology, chemistry, environment, and materials, its disciplinary strength is outstanding, so candidates interested in chemical engineering should pay special attention.
